title: So Mote It Be
lyrics: The lodge being duly formed, before it is declared
open let us invoke a blessing from the GAOTU on all our undertakings. May our labours, thus begun in order, be conducted in peace, and closed in harmony.

title: Open First Degree TB
cue: Wait for the IG to knock three times
lyrics: Hail, Eternal, by Whose aid,
All created things were made;
Heav'n and earth,
Thy vast design;
Hear us, Architect divine.
May our work, begun in Thee,
Ever blest with order be,
And may we, when labours cease,
Part in harmony and peace.

title: Minutes
cue: After the WM knocks to carry the motion
lyrics: This is some nice music, known as William Tell, to play when the Senior Deacon takes the minutes up to be signed.

title: Visitor Entry
cue: When the IG opens the door
lyrics: This can be played earlier if the DC is walking around the lodge to escort the visitors.  It is mainly intended for non PMs.
This tune is known as the March of the Angry Men.

title: Past Masters
cue: When the DC heads west to escort the visitors
lyrics: This is also fine for WM entry.
When the DC is announcing the visitors, lower the volume to barely audible, but keep it playing.
The tune is called Scipio.

title: WM Entry Star Wars
cue: When the door is opened to admit the WM
lyrics: Note: This is a fun track and may not always be appropriate

title: Close First TB
cue: After the IG knocks three times
lyrics: Abide with me, fast falls the eventide;
The darkness deepens, Lord, with me abide;
When other helpers fail, and comforts flee,
Help of the helpless, O abide with me.

title: Fidelity Fidelity
cue: When the IPM is saying - the act
lyrics: Brethren, nothing now remains but, according to Antient custom, to lock up our s . . . ts in a safe and sacred repository, uniting in the act

title: Wardens and Deacons
cue: After the DC says - Brother Deacons
lyrics: Ode 70.2
The day Thou gavest, Lord, is ended,
The darkness falls at Thy behest;
To Thee our morning hymns ascended,
Thy praise shall sanctify our rest.

title: Exit Normal
cue: After the WM says - and Brethren
lyrics: Onwards Brother Masons..

title: Exit Fancy
cue: After the WM says - and Brethren
lyrics: This is a bit fun, so use appropriately
